entry_points: HTTP/ASGI (`uvicorn app:app`) with MCP endpoint at `/mcp/`

tool_mapping.title/content search on mevzuat.gov.tr b: search_kanun | search_teblig | search_cbk | search_cbyonetmelik | search_cbbaskankarar | search_cbgenelge | search_khk | search_tuzuk | search_kurum_yonetmelik
tool_mapping.search within a specific mevzuat.gov.tr: search_within_kanun | search_within_teblig | search_within_cbk | search_within_cbyonetmelik | search_within_cbbaskankarar | search_within_cbgenelge | search_within_khk | search_within_tuzuk | search_within_kurum_yonetmelik

server_initialization_flow.action: Create FastMCP app with server metadata/instructions and initialize shared clients/caches.
server_initialization_flow.notes: Semantic components are conditionally initialized only if `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` is present.

server_initialization_flow.output: 26 MCP-callable tools exposed to MCP clients.

server_initialization_flow.action: Expose ASGI app via `mcp.http_app()` and add `/health` custom route.

mevzuat_search_flow.input: Query text + filters (phrase, date range, paging).

mevzuat_search_flow.action: Sends MCP tool call over `/mcp/` streamable HTTP.
FastMCP validates args from function signature/Pydantic `Field` constraints and executes tool coroutine.
mevzuat_search_flow.output: Validated Python args for tool function.
Client call to mevzuat.gov.tr DataTables API.

mevzuat_search_flow.action: Client first ensures anti-forgery token/cookies via Playwright page visit, then posts JSON search payload with cookies.
Map response rows to `MevzuatDocumentNew` list and wrap into `MevzuatSearchResultNew` (or error result).
Return model as MCP tool result.

mevzuat_content_and_within_flow.action: Calls a `search_within_*` or `get_*_content` tool with legislation identifiers.
mevzuat_content_and_within_flow.input: mevzuat_no (+ tertip, optional resmi_gazete_tarihi, keyword/semantic flags).
Requested tertip and fallback order (`5`, then `3`).

mevzuat_content_and_within_flow.action: Content pipeline branch A: HTML iframe scrape with Playwright -> HTML cleanup -> Markdown conversion.
Content pipeline branch B fallback: DOC/PDF download; for CB KararÄ±/CB Genelgesi use PDF path (optionally Mistral OCR, else markitdown).
mevzuat_content_and_within_flow.input: Constructed DOC/PDF URLs and session cookies when needed.

mevzuat_content_and_within_flow.action: Within-search branch decision: `semantic=false` -> keyword search; `semantic=true` -> embedding-based semantic search.
Keyword mode: split into articles/chunks and evaluate query operators (`AND/OR/NOT`, phrases), rank by score.
Semantic mode: OpenRouter embeddings API call for docs/query (if API key configured), then in-memory vector similarity search.
Returns final string payload through MCP.

bedesten_search_and_detail_flow.action: Normalizes type filters, auto-expands browse mode to all types when no query provided.

bedesten_search_and_detail_flow.output: HTTP POST request payload wrapped as `{data, applicationName, paging}`.

bedesten_search_and_detail_flow.action: Bedesten `/searchDocuments` returns wrapped response with metadata status.
bedesten_search_and_detail_flow.output: Result list (`mevzuatList`, total/start) or error metadata.

bedesten_search_and_detail_flow.action: Map documents to models and format concise list lines including `mevzuatId`/`gerekceId`.
Calls detail tools using IDs from search results.

Detail branches: `get_mevzuat_content` -> `get_document_plain_text`; `search_within_mevzuat` -> plain text article split + keyword scoring; `get_mevzuat_gerekce` -> decode/strip HTML; `get_mevzuat_madde_tree` -> fetch tree + format hierarchy.
Returns tool output via MCP transport.
bedesten_search_and_detail_flow.output: Structured MCP tool result to client.

error_and_cache_branches.action: If upstream call fails, catch exception and return tool-level error string/model instead of raising.
Use in-memory TTL cache for content/search artifacts (mevzuat markdown cache, bedesten cache, embedding cache).
error_and_cache_branches.input: Cache keys by mevzuat identifiers/content hash.
